reviews.comment:
En cuanto a la estación de servicio no tengo objeción , donde doy un CERO ROTUNDO es en Boxes, un desastre, me hicieron reservar por la APP uno tiene todos los datos del vehículo, pensé ingenuamente será para los filtros y todo lo que uno necesita, pues me volví a equivocar, no tenían todos los filtros, cuando finalizaron, no me mostraron ni los filtros cambiados ni me dieron el resto del aceite, ni se que le pusieron, y eso que pedí el service full, jajajaj un fiasco total, la próxima me voy hasta Nordelta donde te atienden como corresponde. Como broche de oro a los días empiezo a sentir un ruido, pensé ups me vibra algo que será, pues los muy descuidados dejaron el soporte del capot suelto, pudo haber sido un desastre y roto el ventilador, lastima que por la APP no se puede dar opiniones porque la mía sería APLAZADO CHANGO, no vuelvas ni en marzo. Ojo si van no vayan a tomar café, controlen todo lo que hacen, tal vez ese fue mi error y pensé que eran profesionales serios, Gracias

(Translated by Google)
As for the gas station itself, I have no complaints. Where I give a complete ZERO is in the service bay. It was a disaster. They made me book through the app, which has all the vehicle information. I naively thought it would be for the filters and everything else one needs, but I was wrong again. They didn't have all the filters. When they finished, they didn't show me the changed filters, nor did they give me the rest of the oil, and I don't even know what they put in. And I even asked for the full service! Hahaha, a total fiasco. Next time, I'm going to Nordelta where they treat you properly. To top it all off, a few days later I started hearing a noise. I thought, "Oops, something's vibrating, what could it be?" Well, those very careless people left the hood support loose. It could have been a disaster and broken the fan. It's a shame you can't give reviews through the app because mine would be: POSTPONED, MAN! Don't go back, not even in March. If you go, don't just go for coffee. Keep an eye on everything they do. Maybe that was my mistake, and I thought they were serious professionals. Thanks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXaE1hWHh3RRAB
